transcript: Speaker A: Bangalore office-la join panni Manager-kitta enna solluvinga? Sir, naan vandhuttaen-nu solluvingala? Evlo awkward-a irukkum theriyuma? Guys, neenga first time out-of-state corporate office-la join panreenganna, oru vishyam nalla purinjikonga. Meeting-leyo, email-lo, presentation-leyo, anga kaandippa English pesa vendi varum. English pesuradhu onnum periya vishyam illa. Neenga summa indha MySivi App-a download pannunga. Appram paarunga. Romba simple-a Tamil-la irundhu English-la pesalam. Naan pudhidhaga serndhullaen. I'm the new joinee. Meeting eppo? When is the meeting scheduled? Indha velai eppadi panradhu? How do I complete this task? Boss varala innum. The manager hasn't arrived yet. Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune enga office-la irundhalum, MySivi kathukkodutha English ungalai confident-a nikka vaikkum. Neengalum office-la meeting-leyo, presentation-leyo pesa koochappattalo, bayandhalo, yosikkama innaikke indha MySivi App-a download pannidunga. Udane install button-a click panni MySivi App-a download pannunga! [What will you say to your manager after joining a Bangalore office? Will you say 'Sir, I have arrived'? Do you know how awkward that is? Guys, if you are joining an out-of-state corporate office for the first time, understand one thing. You will definitely need to speak English in meetings, emails, or presentations. Speaking English is not a big deal. Just download this MySivi App and see. You can easily speak English from Tamil. 'I have newly joined' - 'I'm the new joinee'. 'When is the meeting?' - 'When is the meeting scheduled?'. 'How to do this work?' - 'How do I complete this task?'. 'Boss hasn't come yet' - 'The manager hasn't arrived yet'. Whether you are in Bangalore, Hyderabad, or Pune, the English taught by MySivi will make you stand confidently. If you are shy or afraid to speak in meetings or presentations, download the MySivi App today without hesitation. Click the install button now and download the MySivi App!]
on_screen_text: "Bangalore office-la" [In Bangalore office], join panni [after joining], Laptop - 150000, Manager-kitta [to the manager], Mobile - 80000, "நான் வந்துட்டேன்"-னு ["I have arrived"-like], எவ்வளவு awkward-ஆ [how awkward], இருக்கும் தெரியுமா? [it will be, do you know?], Guys, நீங்க first time [you first time], out-of-state, corporate office-ல [in corporate office], join பண்றீங்கன்னா [if you are joining], ஒரு விஷயம் நல்லா [one thing well], புரிஞ்சுக்கோங்க [understand], meeting-லையோ [in meeting], email-லோ [in email], presentation-லையோ [in presentation], அங்க கண்டிப்பா [there definitely], English பேச வேண்டி [English to speak], வரும் [will come], பேசறது ஒன்னும் [speaking is not], பெரிய விஷயம் [a big thing], இல்ல [no], நீங்க சும்மா [you just], இந்த MySivi App-அ [this MySivi App], download பண்ணுங்க [download], அப்புறம் பாருங்க [then see], ரொம்ப simple-ஆ [very simply], Tamil-ல இருந்து [from Tamil], English-ல பேசலாம் [can speak in English], நான் புதிதாக சேர்ந்துள்ளேன் [I have newly joined], I'm the new joinee, Meeting எப்போ? [When is the meeting?], When is the meeting scheduled?, இந்த வேலை எப்படி பண்றது? [How to do this work?], How do I complete this task?, Boss வரல இன்னும் [Boss hasn't come yet], The manager hasn't arrived yet, Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, எங்க office-ல [in our office], இருந்தாலும் [even if it is], MySivi கத்துக்கொடுத்த [MySivi taught], English உங்களை [English you], confident-ஆ [confidently], நிக்க வைக்கும் [will make stand], நீங்களும் office-ல [You too in office], meeting-லையோ [in meeting], presentation-லையோ [in presentation], பேச கூச்சப்பட்டாலோ [if shy to speak], பயந்தாலோ [or afraid], யோசிக்காம [without thinking], இன்னைக்கே இந்த [today itself this], MySivi App-அ [MySivi App], download பண்ணிடுங்க [download], உடனே Install [Immediately Install], பண்ணி [doing], MySivi App-அ [MySivi App], download பண்ணுங்க! [download!]
summary: The ad highlights the awkwardness of not knowing professional English when starting a corporate job in cities like Bangalore. It introduces the MySivi app as an easy solution to learn English from Tamil. The call to action urges users to download the app immediately to boost their workplace confidence.
